lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਪਾਛੈ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tripat na aavai maaeaa paachhai paavai |
lines.english: Satisfaction is not obtained by chasing after Maya.
He may enjoy all sorts of corrupt pleasures,
but he is still not satisfied; he indulges again and again, wearing himself out, until he dies.
Without contentment, no one is satisfied.
Like the objects in a dream, all his efforts are in vain.
Through the love of the Naam, all peace is obtained.
He Himself is Himself the Cause of causes.
Forever and ever, O Nanak, chant the Lord's Name. ||5||
The Doer, the Cause of causes, is the Creator Lord.
Only a few obtain this, by great good fortune.
As God casts His Glance of Grace, they come to be.
What deliberations are in the hands of mortal beings?
God Himself, of Himself, is unto Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਨੋ ਸੁ ਅਪਨੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh keeno su apanai rang |
lines.english: Whatever He created, was by His Own Pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ਸਭਹੂ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te door sabhahoo kai sang |
lines.english: He is far from all, and yet with all.
He understands, He sees, and He passes judgment.
He Himself is the One, and He Himself is the many.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰੈ ਨ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: marai na binasai aavai na jaae |
lines.english: He does not die or perish; He does not come or go.
O Nanak, He remains forever All-pervading. ||6||
He Himself instructs, and He Himself learns.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਉਸ ਕਾ ਓਹੁ ਕਰਨੈਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kachh us kaa ohu karanaihaar |
lines.english: All things are His; He is the Creator.
He Himself mingles with all.
He Himself created His own expanse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸ ਤੇ ਭਿੰਨ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aus te bhin kahahu kichh hoe |
lines.english: Without Him, what could be done?
He produces His plays with infinite variety.
In His own play, He Himself is the Actor.
In the spaces and interspaces, He is the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: man meh aap man apune maeh |
lines.english: He Himself is in the mind, and the mind is in Him.
True, True, True is God, our Lord and Master.
O Nanak, His worth cannot be estimated. ||7||
By Guru's Grace, some speak of Him.
Beautiful, Beautiful, Beautiful is Your Sublime Form.
True, True, True is the Creator of all.
Out of millions, scarcely anyone knows Him.
You are Exquisitely Beautiful, Infinite and Incomparable.
heard in each and every heart, spoken to the ears.
Pure, Pure, Pure is the Word of Your Bani,
Salok:
Holy, Holy, Holy and Sublimely Pure
- chant the Naam, O Nanak, with heart-felt love. ||8||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਰਨਿ ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਪਰੈ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਉਧਰਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sant saran jo jan parai so jan udharanahaar |
lines.english: One who seeks the Sanctuary of the Saints shall be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਅਵਤਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant kee nindaa naanakaa bahur bahur avataar |1|
lines.english: One who slanders the Saints, O Nanak, shall be reincarnated over and over again. ||1||
Slandering the Saints, one's life is cut short.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਜਮ ਤੇ ਨਹੀ ਛੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan jam te nahee chhuttai |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one shall not escape the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan sukh sabh jaae |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, all happiness vanishes.
Ashtapadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਨਰਕ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan narak meh paae |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one falls into hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੇ ਹਤੇ ਕਉ ਰਖੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant ke hate kau rakhai na koe |
lines.english: One who is cursed by a Saint cannot be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਤੇ ਹੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan sobhaa te heen |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one's reputation is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਮਲੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan mat hoe maleen |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, the intellect is polluted.
O Nanak, in the Company of the Saints, the slanderer may still be saved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਥਾਨ ਭ੍ਰਸਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan thaan bhrasatt hoe |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one's place is defiled.
But if the Compassionate Saint shows His Kindness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਸਰਪ ਜੋਨਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: santan kai dookhan sarap jon paae |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one is reincarnated as a snake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੇ ਦੂਖਨ ਤੇ ਮੁਖੁ ਭਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant ke dookhan te mukh bhavai |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one becomes a wry-faced malcontent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਕਾਗ ਜਿਉ ਲਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: santan kai dookhan kaag jiau lavai |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one croaks like a raven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਹਿ ਜਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: santan kai dookhan trisanaa meh jalai |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one burns in the fire of desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਛਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan sabh ko chhalai |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one tries to deceive everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਗਦ ਜੋਨਿ ਕਿਰਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan trigad jon kiramaae |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, one is reincarnated as a wiggling worm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਦੋਖੀ ਕਾ ਥਾਉ ਕੋ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sant dokhee kaa thaau ko naeh |
lines.english: For the slanderer of the Saint, there is no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਤੇਜੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai dookhan tej sabh jaae |
lines.english: Slandering the Saints, all one's influence vanishes.
Slandering the Saints, one becomes the lowest of the low.
